Abundance of pawpaw along the C&O canal bike path and on the trails leading to the Potomac between lock 8 and lock 6. 

Fruits tend to be ripe towards the end of August into September. Ripe fruits can be found on the ground (if the bugs and critters haven't go
Several pawpaw trees grow along all three Billy Goat sections, with this marker showing an approximate location for one grove. Access: Public.
8013 Quarry Ridge Way, Bethesda, MD 20817, USA
Potomac Heritage Trl, McLean, VA 22101, USA
A few winery bushes along the trail near Langley Island.
